summary_strategy: Position Conner as a builder-focused security engineer who ships production-grade automation for multi-cloud environments, emphasizing deployable controls, data-driven correlation, and auditable AI workflows that reduce manual effort without sacrificing reliability
skills_strategy: Use the 5-line condensed format to group skills by functional theme, prioritizing Cloud & DevSecOps, Security Data & AI, and API Automation—mirroring Astronomer’s emphasis on operational reliability and cross-platform integration

experience_focus.must_highlight: deployable security controls, API-driven automation, data correlation and reconciliation
experience_focus.claims_to_avoid: invented metrics like 'X% reduction in MTTR' without source support, vague claims about 'enterprise-scale impact', or speculative ownership beyond documented responsibilities

risk_controls: Never invent metrics—only retain numbers explicitly present in source material
Avoid phrases like 'enterprise-grade', 'world-class', or 'best-in-class'; use concrete verbs: built, engineered, deployed, integrated
Do not add responsibilities or tools not explicitly listed in baseline resume or analysis mapping
